terms.section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
terms.section1.content: By accessing or using the Tibr platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.
terms.section2.title: 2. Eligibility
terms.section2.content: You must be at least 18 years old and a legal resident of Egypt. You must provide accurate, complete information during registration and maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials.
terms.section3.title: 3. Accounts & KYC
terms.section3.content: To use our services, you must complete the registration process, verify your email via OTP, and submit Know-Your-Customer (KYC) documents including a valid national ID and a selfie. We reserve the right to suspend accounts with incomplete or suspicious KYC submissions.
terms.section4.title: 4. Wallet & Funds
terms.section4.content: Your Tibr wallet holds cash balances used for buying precious metals. Deposits are processed via third-party payment gateways. Withdrawals are subject to minimum and maximum limits (100 EGP min, 50,000 EGP daily max). Funds are held in segregated accounts and are not covered by deposit insurance.
terms.section5.title: 5. Trading Rules
terms.section5.content: Buying and selling of gold and silver is executed at live market prices. All trades are final once confirmed. Tibr acts as an execution-only platform and does not provide investment advice unless explicitly stated.
terms.section6.title: 6. Investment Strategies
terms.section6.content: Automated strategies allow you to set conditional buy/sell rules. Execution types include Alert Only, Auto Execute, and Alert + Execute. You acknowledge that automated trading carries risk and past performance does not guarantee future results.
terms.section7.title: 7. Physical Delivery
terms.section7.content: You may request physical delivery of your metal holdings. Delivery addresses must be accurate and verifiable. Shipping timelines, fees, and insurance terms are provided at the time of request. Tibr is not liable for delays caused by third-party carriers.
terms.section8.title: 8. AI Advisory Disclaimer
terms.section8.content: The AI Academy and Financial Advisor tools provide informational content and market insights only. They do not constitute financial advice, investment recommendations, or solicitation to trade. All investment decisions remain your sole responsibility.
terms.section9.title: 9. Risk Disclosure
terms.section9.content: Investing in precious metals carries inherent risks including market volatility, price fluctuations, liquidity risk, and storage risk. The value of your investment may go down as well as up. You should only invest funds you can afford to lose.
terms.section10.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
terms.section10.content: To the maximum extent permitted by Egyptian law, Tibr shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform, including but not limited to trading losses, system downtime, or AI-generated suggestions.
terms.section11.title: 11. Termination
terms.section11.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or fail KYC/AML compliance checks. Upon termination, you may withdraw your remaining cash balance subject to standard processing times.
terms.section12.title: 12. Governing Law
terms.section12.content: These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any disputes shall be resolved exclusively in the courts of Cairo.
terms.section13.title: 13. Amendments
terms.section13.content: We may update these terms from time to time. Users will be notified of material changes via email or platform notification. Continued use of the platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
privacy.section1.title: 1. Data Controller
privacy.section1.content: Tibr is the data controller for personal data collected through the platform. If you have any questions about this policy or your data rights, please contact our support team.
privacy.section2.title: 2. Data We Collect
privacy.section2.content: We collect: (a) Registration data: name, email, phone number, date of birth; (b) KYC data: national ID number, ID images (front and back), selfie photo; (c) Financial data: wallet balances, transaction history, deposit/withdrawal records, trading activity; (d) Technical data: IP address, device information, browser type, cookies; (e) Communication data: support tickets, chat conversations with AI tools.
privacy.section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
privacy.section3.content: We use your data to: (a) Create and maintain your account; (b) Verify your identity and comply with KYC/AML regulations; (c) Process trades, deposits, withdrawals, and delivery requests; (d) Provide AI-powered educational and advisory responses; (e) Improve platform security and user experience; (f) Send service-related communications.
privacy.section4.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
privacy.section4.content: We process your data based on: (a) Your consent (given during registration and KYC); (b) Contractual necessity (to provide our services); (c) Legal obligations (Egyptian AML, KYC, and data protection laws); (d) Legitimate business interests (platform security, fraud prevention).
privacy.section5.title: 5. Data Sharing
privacy.section5.content: We may share your data with: (a) Payment gateway providers to process deposits and withdrawals; (b) KYC verification service providers; (c) AI hosting infrastructure providers; (d) Regulatory authorities as required by Egyptian law. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.section6.title: 6. Data Retention
privacy.section6.content: KYC documents and identification data are retained for a minimum of 5 years as required by Egyptian AML regulations. Transaction records are retained for 10 years. Chat conversation history is retained until you request deletion. Account data is retained for the duration of your account plus 1 year.
privacy.section7.title: 7. Your Rights
privacy.section7.content: Under Egyptian data protection law, you have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention requirements), restrict processing, request data portability, and withdraw consent at any time.
privacy.section8.title: 8. Cookies
privacy.section8.content: We use essential cookies for authentication (session tokens), functionality (language preference stored locally), and analytics. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality.
privacy.section9.title: 9. Security
privacy.section9.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including 256-bit encryption, secure data centers, access controls, and regular security audits. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section10.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
privacy.section10.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Material changes will be communicated via email or platform notification. We encourage you to review this policy regularly.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
